name: @chbrain/khai-engine-play-mode
description: khai play-mode engine — the mode of engagement in which a persona treats an activity as play
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The mode of engagement in which a persona treats an activity as play.

card.wire: Link the play-mode the persona is in (immersed, exploratory, competitive, or pretend) under Projection.
card.issue: What the persona is playing at and what the play space holds for them.
card.require: A voluntary engagement with an activity that is taken as play, not as work or duty.
card.enforce: Do not model play as a performance of play. The mode is in the quality of the engagement, not in what the activity looks like from outside.
card.setup: Name the activity, the magic circle that separates it from ordinary life, and what the persona risks or stakes in this mode.
